mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO oce ( id, frame, supplier, time, number, total, actual, money, account, people, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, user ) VALUES
( #{oce.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.frame,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.supplier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{oce.number,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.total,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oce.actual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oce.money,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oce.account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.people,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.file,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.data,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.more,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oce.examine,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{oce.nucleus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{oce.user,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
